lanes.label: Source Fidelity
lanes.description: Checks whether bibliographic metadata, study details, metrics, and source locators match the cited literature.

lanes.label: Construct Mapping
lanes.description: Checks that response origin, rubric correctness, label source, human scoring, and AI scoring are not conflated.

lanes.label: Method Classification
lanes.description: Checks that generation model, prompt strategy, generation workflow, response type, and evaluation method are classified consistently.

lanes.label: Scorer Validation Relevance
lanes.description: Checks whether the study actually informs automated scorer validation, calibration, benchmarking, or stress testing rather than adjacent synthetic-data use only.

lanes.label: Applicability Boundary
lanes.description: Checks whether assessment purpose, decision consequence, and operational use are classified clearly enough to avoid transferring low-stakes or developmental evidence into high-stakes validation claims.

lanes.label: Synthesis Overreach
lanes.description: Checks whether synthesis claims stay within the supported task, model, prompt, dataset, rubric, and metric boundaries.

lanes.label: Search Protocol
lanes.description: Optional check for search query, database, screening, inclusion, exclusion, and deduplication notes when a systematic or semi-systematic review protocol is used.
